tasks.subject: Task 1: Add container CSS, update generator, regenerate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add `.edit-form-container` CSS, update generator to wrap edit form in that div, regenerate all edit page HTML files.

**Files:**
- Modify: `maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/EntityEditPageHtmlRenderer.kt`
- Modify: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/styles.scss`
- Regenerated: `maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/generated/typescript/main/app/gen-components/**/*edit-page.html`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `EntityEditPageHtmlRenderer.kt` wraps form selector in `<div class="edit-form-container">`
- [ ] `styles.scss` has `.edit-form-container` with `max-width: 36rem` and `margin: 0 auto`
- [ ] All generated `*edit-page.html` files contain `edit-form-container`

**Verify:** `grep -r "edit-form-container" maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/generated/` → one match per edit page file

```json:metadata
{"files": ["maia-gen/maia-gen-generator/src/main/kotlin/org/maiaframework/gen/renderers/ui/EntityEditPageHtmlRenderer.kt", "maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/styles.scss"], "verifyCommand": "grep -r 'edit-form-container' maia-showcase/maia-showcase-ui/src/generated/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EntityEditPageHtmlRenderer wraps form in edit-form-container div", "styles.scss has .edit-form-container with max-width 36rem and margin 0 auto", "all generated *edit-page.html files contain edit-form-container"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
